content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   StringLiteral
    11	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    12	    ;
    13	
    14	postfixExpression
    15	    :   primaryExpression
    16	        ( LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    17	        | LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
    18	        )*
    19	    ;
    20	
    21	unaryExpression
    22	    :   postfixExpression
    23	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    24	    ;
    25	
    26	unaryOperator
    27	    :   Plus | Minus | Exclaim
    28	    ;
    29	
    30	multiplicativeExpression
    31	    :   unaryExpression ((Star|Slash|Percent) unaryExpression)*
    32	    ;
    33	
    34	additiveExpression
    35	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus|Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    36	    ;
    37	
    38	relationalExpression
    39	    :   additiveExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    40	    ;
    41	
    42	equalityExpression
    43	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|ExclaimEqual) relationalExpression)*
    44	    ;
    45	
    46	logicalAndExpression
    47	    :   equalityExpression (AmpAmp equalityExpression)*
    48	    ;
    49	
    50	logicalOrExpression
    51	    :   logicalAndExpression (PipePipe logicalAndExpression)*
    52	    ;
    53	
    54	assignmentExpression
    55	    :   logicalOrExpression
    56	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    57	    ;
    58	
    59	expression
    60	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    61	    ;
    62	
    63	argumentExpressionList
    64	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    65	    ;
    66	
    67	declaration
    68	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    69	    ;
    70	
    71	declarationSpecifiers
    72	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    73	    ;
    74	
    75	declarationSpecifier
    76	    :   Const
    77	    |   typeSpecifier
    78	    ;
    79	
    80	initDeclaratorList
    81	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    82	    ;
    83	
    84	initDeclarator
    85	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    86	    ;
    87	
    88	typeSpecifier
    89	    :   Int
    90	    |   Void
    91	    ;
    92	
    93	declarator
    94	    :   directDeclarator
    95	    ;
    96	
    97	directDeclarator
    98	    :   Identifier
    99	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
   100	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterList? RightParen
   101	    ;
   102	
   103	parameterList
   104	    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
   105	    ;
   106	
   107	parameterDeclaration
   108	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   109	    ;
   110	
   111	identifierList
   112	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
   113	    ;
   114	
   115	initializer
   116	    :   assignmentExpression
   117	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
   118	    ;
   119	
   120	initializerList
   121	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
   122	    ;
   123	
   124	statement
   125	    :   compoundStatement
   126	    |   expressionStatement
   127	    |   selectionStatement
   128	    |   iterationStatement
   129	    |   jumpStatement
   130	    ;
   131	
   132	compoundStatement
   133	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   134	    ;
   135	
   136	blockItemList
   137	    :   blockItem+
   138	    ;
   139	
   140	blockItem
   141	    :   statement
   142	    |   declaration
   143	    ;
   144	
   145	expressionStatement
   146	    :   expression? Semi
   147	    ;
   148	
   149	selectionStatement
   150	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   151	    ;
   152	
   153	iterationStatement
   154	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   155	    ;
   156	
   157	jumpStatement
   158	    :   Return expression? Semi
   159	    |   Break Semi
   160	    |   Continue Semi
   161	    ;
   162	
   163	compilationUnit
   164	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   165	    ;
   166	
   167	translationUnit
   168	    :   externalDeclaration+
   169	    ;
   170	
   171	externalDeclaration
   172	    :   functionDefinition
   173	    |   declaration
   174	    ;
   175	
   176	functionDefinition
   177	    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen parameterList? RightParen compoundStatement
   178	    ;
   179	
   180	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
